about.title: About me
about.bio: Data Engineer with {{yearsInIT}}+ years in IT, including nearly {{yearsInDataEng}} years focused on data engineering. Experienced in building and operating cloud data pipelines, warehouse models, and analytics workflows using Python, SQL, Apache Airflow, dbt, Snowflake, and BigQuery across AWS, GCP, and Azure. Brings a strong software engineering foundation to improve pipeline reliability, speed up reporting, and deliver trusted data for decision-making.

dataEngineering.title: Data Engineering
dataEngineering.desc: Building and maintaining scalable data management systems, ETL pipelines, and cloud data platforms.

softwareDev.title: Software Development
softwareDev.desc: Delivering high-quality web applications and serverless backend systems at a professional level.

bullets: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science and Informatic Science.
Coursework focus: Software Engineering, Database Systems, Data Structures and Algorithms.

pod.title: Data Engineer — Pod Co.
bullets: Domains: Wholesale, B2B, Distribution Platform
Built and operated ETL/ELT pipelines across Wholesale, B2B, and Distribution Platform domains using Apache Airflow and Airbyte.
Developed SQL-based data models and Metabase dashboards to support business, finance, and sales teams in daily operational and strategic decision-making.
Designed and implemented trend detection and brand monitoring workflows using social data crawling, keyword analysis, and aggregation to identify emerging market signals.
Delivered analytics solutions to improve visibility into product performance, sales trends, and distribution metrics for internal stakeholders.
Maintained and enhanced internal analytics systems and data workflows to ensure reliability and consistency of reporting outputs.

vmo.title: Data Engineer — VMO Holdings Technology JSC
bullets: Domains: Healthcare, Pharmaceutical · Client: Singapore
Migrated legacy cron pipelines to Apache Airflow, improving scheduling, monitoring, and maintainability.
Built ETL workflows for multi-source healthcare and pharmaceutical datasets across lake and warehouse environments.
Supported critical data source migrations while preserving data integrity and downstream compatibility.
Improved pipeline reliability and reconciliation processes that enabled analytics delivery for 200+ recurring reports.
Partnered with analytics teams to investigate data discrepancies and deliver Tableau dashboards for business users.

maxflow.title: Software Engineer / Full-stack Developer — Maxflow R&D Co. Ltd.
bullets: Domains: Industrial Simulation & Analytics · Client: United States
Developed core features for an industrial simulation and analytics platform with configurable workflows.
Re-architected backend services from Flask servers to serverless AWS components, reducing infrastructure cost by approximately 25%.
Implemented simulation modules for distance, energy, wear, and lifecycle cost analysis across 100+ modeled scenarios.
Built data preparation and feature extraction pipelines for predictive maintenance experiments.

fpt.title: Back-end Developer — FPT Information System Corp.
bullets: Domains: Public Sector IT · Client: Vietnam
Built backend services for a national public procurement platform in a 5-engineer team environment.
Contributed to Angular-based front-end improvements, reducing average page load time by approximately 20%.

house3d.title: Web Developer — House3D Co. Ltd.
bullets: Domains: Interior Design Technology
Developed and maintained customer-facing web features for an interior design technology platform.

framgia.title: Web Developer Intern — Framgia Inc. / Sun* Inc.
bullets: Completed Ruby on Rails training and built an e-commerce web project in a 3-member team with payment gateway integrations (PayPal, BaoKim, NganLuong).

pharmaEtl.title: Pharma ETL Modernisation
pharmaEtl.desc: Migrated legacy cron-job ETL pipelines to Apache Airflow for a Singapore-based pharma client, improving reliability and observability across the data platform.

dataLake.title: Multi-Source Data Lake Integration
dataLake.desc: Designed and implemented ETL workflows to collect data from heterogeneous sources and consolidate them into a central data lake and warehouse.

serverless.title: Serverless Backend Migration
serverless.desc: Migrated a Flask monolith to a fully serverless AWS architecture (Lambda, API Gateway, S3, EFS, RDS), reducing operational costs and improving scalability.

workflowPlatform.title: Workflow Automation Platform
workflowPlatform.desc: Contributed to a web platform enabling users to build custom simulation and analytics workflows — similar in concept to Zapier — for industrial engineering clients.

vehicleSim.title: Vehicle Cost Simulation Tool
vehicleSim.desc: Built a simulation system modelling vehicle travel distance, energy consumption, wear rates, and long-term operational costs to support fleet decision-making.

govPortal.title: Government Procurement Portal
govPortal.desc: Revamped a public procurement website to be cross-browser compatible and rebuilt the front-end with Angular 2 for the Vietnamese government.
